arts.ttl: Barcelona training confirms double injury boost
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday been afforded some timely positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that two sidelined members of Hansi Flick’s squad are…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick delivers his verdict on Vitor Roque
arts.sum: One of the biggest talking points ahead of Barcelona’s La Liga trip to Real Betis on Saturday is the reunion between the Blaugrana and Vitor Roque, who faces his parent club for the first time since leaving Barça on loan in the summer after a very turbulent six-month stint in Catalonia earlier this year. Roque has talked a lot about his time at Barça and did so once again this week, and there’s no doubt he’ll be very motivated to play his best football and find the net.

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid ‘more than likely’ to table bid for Barcelona star next summer
arts.sum: The transfer team at Atlético Madrid are expected to sanction a permanent move for Barcelona star Clément Lenglet next summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Friday provided…

arts.ttl: Free agent target left ‘delighted’ after meeting with Barcelona
arts.sum: A fresh insight into the ongoing efforts of La Liga giants Barcelona to bring in Jonathan Tah for next season has on Friday been provided. The name of defender Tah…

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Piroe to strike against Rams
arts.sum: Mo Salah to find the net in the Merseyside derby will be a popular bet this weekend given the Egyptian's scoring streak but Steve Davies has five other potential goalscorers to look out for.

arts.ttl: ‘Not worried’ – Barcelona boss Flick speaks on facing off with Vitor Roque
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has spoken out on the challenge which awaits his side, in keeping tabs on on-loan frontman Vitor Roque this weekend. Barcelona are of course primed…

arts.ttl: Jonathan David cost 'revealed' as Barcelona, Man United 'circle for prolific striker'
arts.sum: Barcelona and Manchester United reportedly learn that a deal for Lille forward Jonathan David will cost in the region of £66.3m.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Lead Race for Inter and Juventus Target Tah
arts.sum: Inter and Juventus are falling behind in the fray to sign Jonathan Tah on a free transfer, while Barcelona are making strides thanks to a recent meeting with his agent. Bayern Munich are squarely in contention as well, as they have been after him for years. The post Barcelona Lead Race for Inter and Juventus Target Tah appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Flick won’t rest Raphinha, says Barça need Brazilian ‘in every game’
arts.sum: One of the biggest contributors to Barcelona’s amazing start to the 2024/25 campaign is Raphinha, who is enjoying the best season of his career under Hansi Flick and continues to lead the Blaugrana both with his play and his leadership on and off the pitch. But Hansi won’t need any convincing this weekend, as the German boss confirmed Raphinha will be in the starting XI for Saturday’s clash against Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Betis vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Betis and Barcelona.
